title: ramium hirtum
intro: Ramium hirtum, also known as the hairy ramium or bear's breech, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is native to Europe and Western Asia and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Ramium hirtum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
